title: Velvety Norwegian Beef Soup
description: A silky, umami-packed Norwegian beef soup that feels both comforting and romantic, made Whole30‑friendly with fresh herbs and a velvety vegetable base.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the beef cubes and sear on all sides until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef and set aside; add the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil to the pot.
Sauté the onion, carrot, celery, and garlic until the onion becomes translucent, about 4 minutes.
Return the beef to the pot and pour in the beef stock, ensuring the beef is mostly submerged.
Add the bay leaf, sea salt, and black pepper.
Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, or until the beef is tender.
Meanwhile, steam or boil the cauliflower florets until very soft, about 10 minutes.
Drain the cauliflower and puree it until smooth, then stir it into the soup for thickness.
Reduce heat to low and let the soup gently simmer for another 10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Add the chopped dill just before serving and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
